features.name: Maximum number of users
features.description: How many users can be added and work together

features.description: Use your plan for free and pay only when you are ready. No question asked

features.name: Ongoing tenders list
features.description: View a detailed list of all running Tenders

features.description: Search Tenders by Object, Reference, Client, Location, Domains, ...

features.description: Filter results by basic fields: deadline, published date, estimate, category

features.name: Advanced filters
features.description: Filter results by advanced fields: guarantee, electronic bidding, Lots count, Samples, Visits, Meetings, Licences, Agrements, ...

features.name: Advanced sort
features.description: Sort Tenders by deadline, publication, estimate, guarantee, ...

features.name: Categories breakdwon
features.description: Breakdown tenders by category

features.description: Group tenders by Client, Execution location or Domains of activity

features.name: Tender details
features.description: View regular details about individual Tenders

features.name: Advanced details
features.description: View advanced data about individual Tenders like Samples requirements, Scheduled visits and meetings, Licences, qualifications, official portal link, views, downloads, ...

features.name: Changes history
features.description: View eventual Changes made to Tenders since publication

features.name: Favorite tenders
